places.name: National Museum of Ethiopia
places.description: Home of the famous Lucy fossil and Ethiopia's most important archaeological artifacts.

places.name: Holy Trinity Cathedral
places.description: The most important Orthodox cathedral in Ethiopia, housing the tombs of Emperor Haile Selassie.

places.name: Unity Park
places.description: Located within the Grand Palace compound, featuring historical artifacts, a zoo, and beautiful gardens.

places.name: Menelik II Palace
places.description: The first palace constructed in Addis Ababa, serving as the seat of the Ethiopian emperors.

places.name: Red Terror Martyrs Memorial Museum
places.description: A solemn museum dedicated to the victims of the Derg regime's Red Terror campaign.

places.name: Ethnological Museum (Addis Ababa University)
places.description: Housed in Haile Selassie's former palace, offering deep insights into Ethiopian culture and tribes.

places.name: Addis Ababa Museum
places.description: A museum showcasing the growth and development of the capital city over the decades.

places.name: Africa Hall (UNECA)
places.description: A historic landmark where the Organization of African Unity was founded.

places.name: St George Cathedral
places.description: An iconic octagonal cathedral commissioned by Emperor Menelik II.

places.name: Yekatit 12 Monument
places.description: A monument honoring victims of the Graziani massacre in Piazza.

places.name: Entoto Natural Park
places.description: A vast natural retreat overlooking Addis Ababa, offering hiking, ziplining, and scenic views.

places.name: Sheger Riverside Park
places.description: A beautiful, newly developed park along the rivers of the city with walkways and fountains.

places.name: Friendship Park
places.description: A central park featuring modern landscaping, water features, and public recreation areas.

places.name: Entoto Maryam Church area
places.description: An ancient church at the top of Mount Entoto surrounded by eucalyptus forests.

places.name: Mount Entoto viewpoint
places.description: The absolute best panoramic viewing spot of the entire Addis Ababa skyline.

places.name: Addis Ababa Lion Zoo
places.description: A historic zoo known for housing the rare black-maned Ethiopian lions.

places.name: Gulele Botanical Garden
places.description: The country's first botanical garden, preserving thousands of indigenous plant species.

places.name: Unity Park Gardens
places.description: The beautifully curated gardens inside the historic Unity Park.

places.name: Merkato Market
places.description: One of the largest open-air markets in Africa, where you can find absolutely anything.

places.name: Shola Market
places.description: A more relaxed but massive traditional market perfect for spices, pottery, and textiles.

places.name: Piazza Market Area
places.description: A historic Italian-influenced shopping district famous for its jewelry shops.

places.name: Shiromeda Market
places.description: The absolute best place in the city to buy traditional Ethiopian cotton clothing (Habesha Kemis).

places.name: Sabon Tera Market
places.description: A vibrant market specializing in wholesale goods, soaps, and local commodities.

places.name: Atikilt Tera vegetable market
places.description: The city's main terminal market for fresh fruit, vegetables, and daily produce.

places.name: Tomoca Coffee
places.description: The oldest and most famous coffee roaster in Addis Ababa with a vintage Italian feel.

places.name: Kaldi's Coffee (Bole branch)
places.description: Often called the 'Starbucks of Ethiopia', serving strong espresso and macchiatos.

places.name: Kaldi's Coffee (Kazanchis)
places.description: A bustling neighborhood branch of the beloved Ethiopian coffee chain.

places.name: Garden of Coffee
places.description: An artisan coffee shop where beans are hand-roasted in front of you.

places.name: Alem Bunna
places.description: A respected local cafe chain famous among daily commuters.

places.name: Galani Coffee
places.description: A highly aesthetically pleasing industrial-chic coffee shop in the Gerji area.

places.name: Moplaco Coffee Shop
places.description: A premium specialty coffee exporter serving exceptional brews.

places.name: Yod Abyssinia
places.description: A legendary cultural restaurant offering traditional food and incredible live dancing shows.

places.name: Habesha 2000
places.description: Another premier traditional restaurant experience with huge platters and nightly entertainment.

places.name: Kategna Restaurant
places.description: A modern, upscale take on traditional Ethiopian food, highly popular with locals.

places.name: 2000 Habesha Cultural Restaurant
places.description: Spacious venue offering a deep dive into Ethiopian culinary and musical traditions.

places.name: Sishu Restaurant
places.description: Famous for serving the absolute best burgers in Addis Ababa using local ingredients.

places.name: Lucy Lounge
places.description: A relaxed, sophisticated dining spot conveniently located near the National Museum.

places.name: Castelli Restaurant
places.description: A historic, world-class Italian restaurant in Piazza, frequented by celebrities.

places.name: Five Loaves Restaurant
places.description: A charming bistro and bakery known for its incredible pastries and fresh sandwiches.

places.name: Dashen Traditional Restaurant
places.description: A quieter, more intimate traditional dining experience set in a lovely garden.

places.name: Sheraton Addis
places.description: The pinnacle of luxury in Addis Ababa, featuring majestic pools and opulent rooms.

places.name: Hyatt Regency Addis Ababa
places.description: A sleek, modern luxury hotel located centrally in Meskel Square.

places.name: Radisson Blu Addis Ababa
places.description: A top-tier business hotel in the Kazanchis diplomatic district.

places.name: Capital Hotel & Spa
places.description: A five-star experience known for its expansive fitness and spa facilities.

places.name: Marriott Executive Apartments Addis Ababa
places.description: Luxury extended-stay apartments perfect for international business travelers.

places.name: Golden Tulip Addis Ababa
places.description: A reliable, modern upscale hotel situated in the lively Bole district.

places.name: Best Western Plus Addis Ababa
places.description: A highly-rated, comfortable western-style hotel right near the airport.

places.name: Jupiter International Hotel
places.description: A fantastic mid-range option with excellent hospitality and breakfast.

places.name: Harmony Hotel Addis Ababa
places.description: Offering spacious rooms and a large indoor swimming pool.

places.name: Hotel Lobelia
places.description: A very popular and budget-friendly choice with clean rooms and airport shuttle.

places.name: Bole Ambassador Hotel
places.description: A well-established staple in the Bole area, close to all the action.

places.name: Addis City Highlights Tour
places.description: A full-day guided excursion covering the top monuments and museums in the capital.

places.name: Merkato Market Tour
places.description: A guided navigation through the chaotic, vibrant aisles of Africa's largest market.

places.name: Coffee Ceremony Experience
places.description: A traditional, multi-step process showing how Ethiopians roast and brew coffee at home.

places.name: Entoto Mountain Tour
places.description: A scenic drive into the mountains surrounding the city, including stops at historic churches.

places.name: Addis Food Tour
places.description: A culinary journey tasting injera, raw meat delicacies, and local street food safely.

places.name: Historical Addis Walking Tour
places.description: Explore the Piazza district and learn about the city's foundation and Italian era.

places.name: Unity Park Guided Tour
places.description: A deep dive into the history of the Ethiopian monarchy within the grand palace.

places.name: Addis Nightlife Tour
places.description: Experience the vibrant clubs, azmari bets (traditional bars), and lounges of the city.

places.name: Ride Ethiopia
places.description: The most popular, Uber-like ride-hailing app in the country.

places.name: Feres Ride
places.description: A highly competitive ride-hailing app known for offering zero percent commission to drivers.

places.name: ZayRide
places.description: An early pioneer in the Ethiopian ride-hailing and taxi booking industry.

places.name: PickPick Taxi
places.description: Instantly recognizable yellow and green metered taxis across the city.

places.name: Addis Airport Taxi
places.description: The official yellow cabs servicing Bole International Airport arrivals.

places.name: ETT Tours Ethiopia
places.description: One of the most affordable and robust group-tour operators for the Danakil and beyond.

places.name: Green Land Tours Ethiopia
places.description: A highly experienced and premium tour operator established decades ago.

places.name: Ethio Travel and Tours
places.description: The leading company for comprehensive Ethiopian excursions.

places.name: Simien Eco Tours
places.description: Specialists in ethical, high-quality trekking tours in the Simien Mountains.

places.name: Travel Ethiopia
places.description: A professional agency providing curated travel experiences across the whole country.
